2176200.name: Now you are the persecuted
2176200.description:
Run. Don’t fight.

You spawn in a weird, half-loaded dungeon. No sword. No loot. No upgrades. Just you, a white door, and a bunch of enemies that don’t stop coming. Every door you open means more monsters chasing you down.

Controls

  • Move with WASD or arrows.

  • Dash with Shift or right click.

That’s all you get.

Procedural chaos

Every floor is randomly generated, so you never really know what’s waiting—other than more enemies and more panic.

Simple to play, hard to survive

  • Find the white door to escape the dungeon.

  • Each door you enter spawns another enemy.

  • No fighting. No items. Just pure running for your life.

Bugs included

This is one of my first solo games, so expect glitches. Enemies might do something stupid. Things might break. That’s kind of the fun of it.

Why play this?

Because it’s free, it’s quick to pick up, and it’ll either make your heart race or make you rage.
